# Dysumcorp

> Professional secure file collection portal for CPAs, lawyers, and consultants. Branded client document upload with bank-level encryption. No client login required.

Dysumcorp is designed to streamline the document collection process for professional service providers. By providing a branded, secure, and easy-to-use portal, it eliminates the need for complex client logins while maintaining bank-level security.

## Links

- [Home](/): The main landing page for Dysumcorp.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Details about subscription plans and features.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles and updates about secure file collection and professional workflows.

## Use Cases

- [For Accountants](/use-cases/accountants): How CPAs and accounting firms use Dysumcorp to collect client documents.
- [For Lawyers](/use-cases/lawyers): Streamlining document discovery and client intakes for legal professionals.
- [For Freelancers](/use-cases/freelancers): Simple and secure file requests for independent contractors.
- [For Marketing Agencies](/use-cases/marketing-agencies): Collecting assets and approvals from clients efficiently.
- [For Photographers](/use-cases/photographers): Managing client photo uploads and project assets.

## Technical Details

### Security
Dysumcorp employs bank-level encryption for all file transfers and storage. Data is encrypted at rest and in transit, ensuring client confidentiality and compliance with professional standards.

### Integrations
- [Dropbox Integration](/integrations/dropbox): Seamlessly sync collected files to your Dropbox account.
- [Google Drive Integration](/integrations/google-drive): Automatically save documents to your Google Drive folders.
